hooks.command: curl -sS --max-time 8 -X POST 'https://api.uncrewedmaritime.com/memory/log' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"topic":"session-stop","insight":"Claude Code session ended on grid-engine project","source":"claude-code","category":"Work","project":"grid-engine"}' -H "X-API-Key: $ASH_BRAIN_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null || true
